name: GeoNames cities15000
note: zip of cities15000.txt — tab-separated GeoNames dump (col 1 = geonameid, col 2 = name, col 3 = asciiname, col 15 = population). Populated places > 15000 people (~34k rows). Intentionally UNPINNED (empty sha256): GeoNames regenerates the dump ~daily, so a pinned hash would go stale every day; the download is used as-is without content verification (the fetch prints the computed hash for reference).
